title: Crunchy American Courgettes Fried-Rice
description: A low-carb friendly, cheesy, flavorful American dish that features crunchy courgettes, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a separate skillet over medium heat.
Cook the diced bacon in the first skillet until crispy, about 4 minutes.
Add the chopped onion to the first skillet and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the first skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cooked rice to the first skillet and stir to combine with the bacon and onion mixture.
Push the rice mixture to one side of the skillet.
Add the beaten eggs to the empty side of the skillet and scramble until cooked through.
Combine the eggs with the rice mixture and stir to combine.
Add the shredded cheese to the rice mixture and stir to combine.
Add the diced courgettes to the rice mixture and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the fried rice to a serving platter and serve hot.
